buildAHooperBuilds.title: Build a Hooper Builds
buildAHooperBuilds.intro: Build a Hooper turns player creation into the heart of the game — choose a position, shape a physical profile, allocate attributes, and define a playstyle. These build templates organize the most popular basketball roles so you can design a career path that fits how you want to play.

items.description: A guard-focused build designed around creating shots, controlling possessions, and leading the offense from the perimeter.

items.position: Point Guard / Shooting Guard / Small Forward
items.description: A flexible build for players who want to contribute across multiple areas and adapt to any matchup.
A center-focused build designed around controlling the paint, protecting the rim, and dominating inside play.

buildAHooperPositions.title: Build a Hooper Positions
buildAHooperPositions.intro: In Build a Hooper, your position defines your role on the court and shapes every attribute decision that follows. Learn what each position is responsible for before you commit to a build direction.

items.description: The floor leader who handles the ball, sets up teammates, and runs the offense.
A guard role built around generating points from the perimeter and moving without the ball.
A flexible position that blends scoring, defense, and versatility across the court.
A big-man role focused on protecting the paint, rebounding, and controlling inside play.

buildAHooperAttributes.title: Build a Hooper Attributes
buildAHooperAttributes.intro: Attributes are where a Build a Hooper player takes shape. Decide where to spend your points and your build becomes a scorer, a creator, a defender, or a balanced athlete.

items.goal: For players who want stronger offensive impact and finishing around the rim.
For players who prioritize stops, rim protection, and team defense.
For players who want a specific physical identity and presence on the court.
For players who want steady contributions across the court.

buildAHooperBadges.title: Build a Hooper Badges
buildAHooperBadges.intro: Badges in Build a Hooper enhance specialized player abilities and sharpen the identity of your build. Use badge concepts to reinforce how you want your player to perform on the court.

items.effect: Reinforces a player's scoring identity and offensive strengths.
Boosts players who create plays and run the offense.
Empowers players focused on interior basketball roles.

buildAHooperCareer.title: Build a Hooper Career Mode Guide
buildAHooperCareer.intro: Build a Hooper focuses on creating and developing a personalized basketball player experience inspired by modern basketball career simulations. Players can customize their hooper, improve abilities, and follow a progression journey through simulated seasons and achievements.

steps.title: Create Your Hooper
steps.description: Start by designing a custom basketball player with your preferred position, physical profile, and playstyle direction.

steps.title: Develop Player Skills
steps.description: Improve your player's performance by focusing on attributes and gameplay choices that match your preferred role on the court.

steps.title: Build Career Progress
steps.description: Advance through basketball experiences while developing your player's reputation and overall ability.

steps.title: Create a Legacy
steps.description: Continue improving your player and shape a unique basketball career path through long-term progression.

buildAHooperDraft.title: Build a Hooper Draft Guide
buildAHooperDraft.intro: The draft experience is designed around starting a new player's journey. Creating a balanced build, selecting a suitable position, and understanding player strengths are important parts of building a successful basketball career in Build a Hooper.

steps.title: Choose Your Player Identity
steps.description: Decide whether your hooper will focus on scoring, playmaking, defense, rebounding, or an all-around style.

steps.title: Select a Position
steps.description: Pick a basketball role such as guard, wing, or big man based on the type of player you want to create.

steps.title: Customize Your Build
steps.description: Adjust player characteristics including size, physical profile, and gameplay focus.

steps.title: Begin Your Career Journey
steps.description: Start developing your created player and progress through the basketball simulation experience.

buildAHooperTeams.title: Build a Hooper Teams Guide
buildAHooperTeams.intro: Build a Hooper is designed around a basketball simulation concept where teams and league environments provide context for a player's career journey. The game draws inspiration from NBA-style career systems, where team selection and progression influence the overall experience.

items.name: NBA-Inspired Franchises
items.fit: Explore Build a Hooper career concepts inspired by professional team systems and league structures.

items.name: Career Environment
items.fit: Different team contexts shape how your created hooper's role and development unfold over a career.

items.name: Player Role
items.fit: Your position and playstyle help define how you fit into a Build a Hooper team system.

items.name: Team Selection
items.fit: Pick a franchise whose system and culture match the career you want to build.

buildAHooperBeginner.title: Build a Hooper Beginner Guide
buildAHooperBeginner.intro: New players can start by learning the basics of player creation, basketball roles, and progression concepts. This beginner guide explains the main ideas behind building and developing a custom hooper in Build a Hooper.

faqs.question: What is Build a Hooper?
faqs.answer: Build a Hooper is a Roblox basketball simulation focused on creating and developing a custom basketball player from draft day through a long career.

faqs.question: How should beginners create their first Build a Hooper player?
faqs.answer: Start in Build a Hooper by choosing a position and playstyle that matches how you want your player to perform on the court.

faqs.question: What should new Build a Hooper players focus on first?
faqs.answer: Learn the Build a Hooper player creation system, understand basketball roles, and improve your player's abilities through steady progression.

faqs.question: Can players create different types of hoopers in Build a Hooper?
faqs.answer: Yes. In Build a Hooper you can design different player concepts by changing positions, builds, and preferred basketball styles.

faqs.question: Does Build a Hooper have a career mode?
faqs.answer: Yes. Build a Hooper's career mode follows your created player from the draft through rookie seasons, awards, and a long legacy.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Build a Hooper

questions.question: What is Build a Hooper?
questions.answer: Build a Hooper is a Roblox basketball simulation where you create a custom player, choose a position, allocate attributes, and build an NBA career from the draft onward.

questions.question: Where can I play Build a Hooper?
questions.answer: Build a Hooper is available on Roblox. You can start building your player directly through the Roblox platform.

questions.question: How do builds work in Build a Hooper?
questions.answer: In Build a Hooper, a build is your custom player — defined by position, physical profile, attribute allocation, and playstyle choices that shape your entire career.

questions.question: Which positions can I choose in Build a Hooper?
questions.answer: Build a Hooper lets you build around basketball positions like Point Guard, Shooting Guard, Small Forward, and Center, each with its own role and responsibilities.

questions.question: Does Build a Hooper have a career and draft mode?
questions.answer: Yes. Build a Hooper includes a career mode where your created player enters the NBA Draft, joins a team, and grows from rookie to legend.

questions.question: What are badges in Build a Hooper?
questions.answer: Badges in Build a Hooper enhance specialized abilities and reinforce your build's identity, from scoring and playmaking to defense and inside play.

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Hooper?
cta.description: Watch Build a Hooper gameplay on YouTube, then jump into Roblox to start your NBA career simulation today!
